description: Add task statuses so users can track whether work is pending, in progress, or done.

userStories.title: Add task status schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to add a status column to the tasks table with a default of 'pending' so tasks have a state.
acceptanceCriteria: Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'

userStories.title: Add shared type for task status
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to define a task status type (pending, in progress, done) to ensure type safety.

userStories.title: Add backend action to update task status
userStories.description: As a user, I want the backend to support updating task statuses so UI changes persist.

userStories.title: Show status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the current status of a task as a badge on its card.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards render a status badge
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control to task rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task's status directly from the task list.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list rows have a control to change status
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status filter to task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status to find specific work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list includes a filter dropdown for statuses
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
